title: solanum dulcamara subvar. villosissimum
intro: Solanum dulcamara subvar. villosissimum, also known as the hairy or woody nightshade, is a subvariety of the Nightshade plant (Solanum dulcamara) that belongs to the Solanaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Solanum dulcamara subvar. villosissimum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and support immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of this plant include tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
